# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.

Write secure code.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Custom User Authentication
Description: A simple user authentication plugin with password hashing.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

defined('ABSPATH') or die('No script kiddies please!');

class CustomUserAuth {
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_user_registration'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_user_login'));
    }

    public function handle_user_registration() {
        if (isset($_POST['register'])) {
            $username = sanitize_user($_POST['username']);
            $password = $_POST['password'];
            $hashed_password = password_hash($password, PASSWORD_DEFAULT);

            if (!username_exists($username)) {
                $user_id = wp_create_user($username, $hashed_password);
                if (!is_wp_error($user_id)) {
                    echo 'Registration successful!';
                } else {
                    echo 'Registration failed: ' . $user_id->get_error_message();
                }
            } else {
                echo 'Username already exists.';
            }
        }
    }

    public function handle_user_login() {
        if (isset($_POST['login'])) {
            $username = sanitize_user($_POST['username']);
            $password = $_POST['password'];

            $user = get_user_by('login', $username);
            if ($user && password_verify($password, $user->user_pass)) {
                wp_set_auth_cookie($user->ID);
                echo 'Login successful!';
            } else {
                echo 'Invalid username or password.';
            }
        }
    }
}

new CustomUserAuth();

function custom_authentication_form() {
    ?>
    <form method="post">
        <h2>Register</h2>
        <input type="text" name="username" required placeholder="Username">
        <input type="password" name="password" required placeholder="Password">
        <input type="submit" name="register" value="Register">
    </form>
    <form method="post">
        <h2>Login</h2>
        <input type="text" name="username" required placeholder="Username">
        <input type="password" name="password" required placeholder="Password">
        <input type="submit" name="login" value="Login">
    </form>
    <?php
}

add_shortcode('custom_auth_form', 'custom_authentication_form');
?>
